seo_title: Sterling Silver Antler Jewelry – Handcrafted Nature-Inspired Pieces
meta_description: Explore our sterling silver antler necklaces, pendants, and charms. Each piece is handcrafted on Vancouver Island in 925 silver. Symbolism, care, and styling tips.
intro: The antler has long been a symbol of strength, renewal, and connection to the wild. In sterling silver, its form becomes both subtle and enduring — a quiet talisman for those who feel most themselves among the trees. This collection is for the hiker, the hunter, the dreamer who carries a piece of the forest close to the heart.
why_this_pairing: Sterling silver mirrors the antler's natural grace without competing with it. The metal's cool, reflective surface catches light the way dew catches on a morning rack, while its weight — substantial but not heavy — gives the symbol a grounded presence. Silver does not mimic bone; it honors it by offering a different kind of quiet strength. Over time, sterling silver develops a soft patina that echoes the weathered beauty of a shed antler found on the forest floor. This pairing suits those who want their jewelry to feel both ancient and modern, rugged and refined.
about_the_material: Our sterling silver is 925 — 92.5% pure silver alloyed with 7.5% copper for durability. It is hypoallergenic for most wearers and arrives with a bright, polished finish that will gently mellow with wear. Silver is denser than it looks, giving each piece a satisfying heft. For more on how we source and work this metal, visit our Materials Hub.
about_the_symbol: The antler is a symbol of regeneration — shed and regrown each year, it represents cycles of growth, death, and rebirth. In Celtic tradition, the stag is a guide to the otherworld, a keeper of forest knowledge. For many Indigenous cultures of North America, antlers signify spiritual authority and connection to the natural world. We honor these origins by designing from naturally shed antlers, never harming the animal. Our designs capture the specific character of deer, elk, and stag antlers, each with its own taper and texture.
how_to_wear: An antler pendant sits best at collarbone length — try an 18-inch chain for a classic look or a 20-inch for a more relaxed feel. It layers well with other silver pieces, especially simple chains or a single gemstone. For daily wear, choose a shorter length that won't catch on clothing. Reserve longer, more ornate designs for occasions when you want the antler to be the focal point.
care: Clean your sterling silver antler piece with a soft cloth after wearing to remove oils and prevent tarnish. Avoid contact with chlorine, salt water, and household cleaners. Store in a dry, airtight pouch or box. For deeper cleaning, use a silver polishing cloth or a gentle silver dip — rinse thoroughly and dry. If the piece becomes heavily tarnished, a jeweler can restore its finish.

faq.q: What does an antler necklace symbolize?
faq.a: Antler jewelry often symbolizes strength, renewal, and a deep connection to nature. Because antlers are shed and regrown each year, they also represent cycles of growth and transformation.

faq.q: How do you clean a sterling silver antler necklace?
faq.a: Use a soft silver polishing cloth to gently buff the surface. Avoid abrasive materials. For intricate details, a soft toothbrush with mild soap and water can be used, then rinse and dry thoroughly.

faq.q: Is 925 sterling silver good for jewelry?
faq.a: Yes, 925 sterling silver is an excellent choice for jewelry. It is durable, hypoallergenic for most people, and has a beautiful bright finish that can be polished to a high shine.

faq.q: What is the difference between a deer and a stag necklace?
faq.a: A stag necklace typically features a male deer with antlers, often depicted with a more majestic or regal posture. A deer necklace may include does or fawns without antlers, or a more generic deer silhouette.

faq.q: Can you wear sterling silver jewelry every day?
faq.a: Yes, sterling silver is durable enough for daily wear. However, it may tarnish over time with exposure to air and chemicals. Regular cleaning and proper storage will keep it looking its best.

faq.q: What to look for when buying sterling silver jewelry?
faq.a: Look for a '925' stamp indicating genuine sterling silver. Check the craftsmanship — smooth edges, secure clasps, and consistent finish. Consider the design's weight and how it will feel when worn.

faq.q: Meaning of a deer antler gift
faq.a: Gifting a deer antler piece often conveys wishes for strength, renewal, and a connection to nature. It can also symbolize protection and guidance, as the stag is seen as a guardian of the forest.
